name: rtemplate-mcp
description: TEMPLATE: Replace with a one-line description of your MCP server. E.g.: 'Gotify notification server MCP bridge for Gemini CLI.'
author: Jacob Magar

settings.name: rtemplate_api_url
settings.description: TEMPLATE: Replace 'rtemplate_api_url' with your service's credential field name. Maps to RTEMPLATE_API_URL.

settings.name: rtemplate_api_key
settings.description: TEMPLATE: Replace 'rtemplate_api_key' with your service's credential field name. Maps to RTEMPLATE_API_KEY.

settings.name: api_token
settings.description: Optional bearer token for HTTP MCP fallback. Not used by the default stdio connection.

settings.name: server_url
settings.description: Optional HTTP server base URL for remote/platform fallback and health monitoring. The default MCP connection uses local stdio instead.

settings.name: auth_mode
settings.description: Server auth mode. 'bearer' uses only the static API token. 'oauth' enables Google OAuth/JWT.

settings.name: no_auth
settings.description: Run the MCP server without authentication. ONLY safe when the server is bound to 127.x loopback.

settings.name: public_url
settings.description: Public base URL for OAuth issuer metadata, e.g. https://example.yourdomain.com. Required when auth_mode=oauth.

settings.name: google_client_id
settings.description: Google OAuth client ID used when auth_mode=oauth.

settings.name: google_client_secret
settings.description: Google OAuth client secret from the same Google Cloud Console credential.

settings.name: auth_admin_email
settings.description: Bootstrap allowed Google account for OAuth mode.
